step_rationale: Antiplatelet and antithrombotic effects; protective HDL subclass.
mechanism: HDL2 exerts antiplatelet and antithrombotic effects, opposing platelet activation at the thrombotic phase of Type 1 MI.

references.title: Acute coronary syndrome remodels the antiplatelet aggregation properties of HDL particle subclasses.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
